findings.problem: The resolution keeps re-stating its thesis in abstract summary after the concrete beats have already landed. Jet's realization that home is contingent and the crew is returning to the same place with different knowledge is spelled out at the landing, restated over noodles, and then restated again in the final tableau, which blunts the chapter's closing pressure and keeps the ending from trusting its own images.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten the explanatory paragraphs anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:263, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:265, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:335, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:411, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:427, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:429. Keep the concrete resolution beats already earned on-page (the empty spot, Jet signing his full name, the repaired compressor, Faye's half-open door), but cut or recast at least two of the abstract paraphrases so each late-scene paragraph adds a new physical or relational consequence instead of re-explaining the same insight.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised chapter still includes the empty-spot landing, the full-name tab beat, the refrigerator repair, and the final Bebop tableau, but after snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:255 the text states the 'same place / changed underneath' thesis no more than once in abstract summary. Fail if two or more later paragraphs still paraphrase that realization instead of letting concrete action or sensory residue carry it.

findings.problem: The chapter leans on the same negation-then-correction sentence shape often enough to register as a tic: 'Not resolved. Finished,' 'Not grief. Not even guilt, exactly. Just awareness,' 'She did not... She did not... She just...,' 'not absolved, not undone, just still here.' Because the pattern clusters around the emotional landing, the prose starts sounding composed by formula rather than surprised by the moment.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the mirrored sentence architecture at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:131, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:267, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:403, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:427. Keep the emotional meaning, but vary the syntax and let at least two of these beats land through concrete gesture, sound, or spatial detail rather than a stacked negation/correction formula.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, in the revised versions of the beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:131, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:267, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:403, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:427, no more than one uses a repeated negation/correction structure ('not X / not Y / just Z' or 'did not / did not / just'). Fail if the revised chapter still uses that same shape in two or more of those four emotional beats.

summary: Character voices stay distinct and contraction discipline aligns with the style bible; no example-line reuse, tense drift, or continuity contradiction surfaced in the allowed inputs. The chapter still falls below pass level on award/craft/prose because the ending repeats its 'same place, changed underneath' thesis in abstract summary and leans on a recurring negation/correction sentence formula instead of trusting the already-earned concrete beats.
